chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. B. A. No.255 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on office objection as at “A” 2. For orders on MA No.1507/2025 3. For hearing of bail application ------------------------------------- 14.02.2025 None present ------------------- In terms of order dated 28.01.2025, counsel for applicants/accused sought time to file copy of FIR No.1530/2024, registered at P.S. FIA Cyber Crime, Faisalabad. Today, neither applicants/accused nor their counsel are in attendance. Therefore, instant criminal bail application is dismissed on account of non-prosecution. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
